# Stay Starving Holdings LLC

> Stay Starving Holdings LLC is a systems-driven holding company founded by Charles "Trey" Cooper III, building $100M+ in diversified holdings across AI automation, real estate, media, education, fashion, and strategic investments. Headquartered in Florida, operating nationwide.

## What We Do

Stay Starving operates 9 divisions. Each one is a system — automated, measurable, and designed to scale without the founder.

### LuxCor AI — AI Automation & Consulting
- Website: https://luxcor.tech
- Custom AI automation solutions for businesses
- Uses the proprietary WAT Framework (Workflows, Agents, Tools)
- Services: AI workflow audits, custom AI agent development, voice agent deployment, business process automation
- Pricing: Starter audit at $997 | Growth retainer at $4,500/mo | Enterprise builds $30K–$50K
- 6+ client projects delivered
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/luxcor-ai

### Trey Cooper Realty — Licensed Florida Real Estate
- Licensed Florida Realtor specializing in multifamily and commercial properties
- 3 houses sold in 2025
- AI-powered lead qualification and market analysis
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/trey-cooper-realty

### The Boardroom — Free Wealth Building Community
- Free membership community on Skool
- 36+ lessons across 3 tracks: AI Systems, Real Estate, Stock Market & Options
- Gamified progression: Associate → Analyst → VP → Director → C-Suite
- No credit card required
- Join: https://staystarving.com/boardroom
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/the-boardroom

### KayphoriaX — High Fashion Brand
- High fashion lingerie couture brand
- Featured across 7 seasons of New York Fashion Week (NYFW)
- KXSS collaboration with Stay Starving (premium hoodies and sweatpants)
- Collections: HEART ABLAZE, GOOD VS. EVIL, DREAMLAND, GARDEN
- Shop: https://kayphoriax.com
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/kayphoriax

### Stay Starving Media — YouTube & Content
- YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@TreyCooper
- 12+ videos on AI automation, no-code tools, real estate, wealth building
- New content weekly
- Topics: Claude Code, Gemini AI, AI agents, automation tutorials, investing
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/stay-starving-media

### C6 Properties — Airbnb & Short-Term Rentals
- Real estate investment and short-term rental operations
- Dynamic pricing optimization, automated guest communication
- Smart home IoT integration
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/c6-properties

### Opulent Sky Solutions — Drone Services
- Professional drone services for real estate, commercial, and events
- Aerial photography, 4K video flyovers, property surveys
- Licensed and insured drone operations
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/opulent-sky-solutions

### Stay Starving Ventures — Strategic Investments
- Deploys capital into creators, automation startups, and ecosystem-aligned opportunities
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/stay-starving-ventures

### Stay Starving Foundation — Youth Mentorship
- Nonprofit arm for youth mentorship, financial literacy, and automation education
- Community outreach and scholarship programs
- Portfolio: https://staystarving.com/portfolio/stay-starving-foundation

## Social Proof & Metrics

## Founder: Charles "Trey" Cooper III
- Mechanical engineer (BS Mechanical Engineering, NC A&T State University; MS Management, University of Florida)
- Licensed Florida Realtor (age 22)
- First investment property at age 25
- Investing in stocks and crypto since age 18
- Built the WAT Framework for production-grade AI automation
- Builder of 6+ websites using AI tools

## WAT Framework (Workflows, Agents, Tools)
LuxCor AI's proprietary AI systems architecture:
- **Workflows**: Markdown SOPs defining objectives, required inputs, tools to use, expected outputs, and edge case handling
- **Agents**: AI decision-makers that read workflows, call tools in sequence, handle failures, and improve over time
- **Tools**: Deterministic Python scripts for API calls, data transformations, file operations, and database queries
- Key insight: A five-step AI workflow at 90% accuracy per step yields only 59% end-to-end accuracy. By making execution deterministic, WAT achieves near 100% per-step tool accuracy while AI focuses on orchestration.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does AI automation cost?**
LuxCor AI offers three tiers: Starter AI Workflow Audit at $997 (one-time), Growth AI Agent Retainer at $4,500/month, and Enterprise Custom AI Build at $30,000–$50,000 for full-scale AI infrastructure.

**Is The Boardroom free?**
Yes. The Boardroom is a completely free membership community with 36+ lessons across AI, real estate, and investing. No credit card required. Join at staystarving.com/boardroom.

**Does Stay Starving offer real estate services?**
Yes. Trey Cooper Realty is a licensed Florida real estate service specializing in multifamily and commercial properties. 3 houses sold in 2025.

**What is the WAT Framework?**
The WAT Framework (Workflows, Agents, Tools) is a three-layer AI architecture that separates probabilistic AI reasoning from deterministic code execution. It improves reliability for multi-step AI operations by using tested Python scripts for execution while AI handles orchestration and decision-making.

**What was KayphoriaX featured at?**
KayphoriaX, the high fashion brand affiliated with Stay Starving, has been featured across 7 seasons of New York Fashion Week (NYFW). The brand focuses on body positivity, creative self-expression, and diversity in fashion.
